CustomField.description: Available to use on DSJ - Active on Contract
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Start_Date__c)) && NOT(ISBLANK(End_Date__c)) && AND((TODAY() >= Start_Date__c),(TODAY() <= End_Date__c)), true, IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Start_Date__c)) && ISBLANK(End_Date__c) && (TODAY() >= Start_Date__c), true, IF(NOT(ISBLANK(End_Date__c)) && ISBLANK(Start_Date__c) && (End_Date__c >= TODAY()), true, IF(ISBLANK(Start_Date__c) && ISBLANK(End_Date__c), true, false ) ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto calculated based on Start/End Date; Active by default if Start/End Date is blank
CustomField.label: Active
